title: Suvarnagrama Amusement Park & Resorts - the most affordable family friendly plac...
description: Suvarnagrama Amusement Park & Resorts - the most affordable family friendly place. Not a promotion video. And let me explain why im sharing this video. I met the owner who said something very beautiful. He said “binodon shudhu privileged manush rai keno afford korte parbe? Eta to shobar right. Everyone should make entertainment and amusement more affordable jaate shobai taar day to day life er shob darkness theke ektu break paay. Dorkar hoile manush basha theke khabar banay ene ekhane eshei khaabe. Kinar dorkar nai. But tara ekhane eshe family niye enjoy koruk. Homely feel koruk” Hearing this i really grew respect for the man. Btw everyone should visit this place once at least. Thanks to our friend john and meghan for taking us there. I never new such a place existed in bd. What you see in the video is not even 30% Of the total area thats filled with rides, safari , and what not. The food is beyond amazing. Maane not kidding. The beef shutki is to die for. Omg. So gooodd. You may end up staying at one of the cottages right in the middle of water. Just try once. And you will feel like home.

description: Ek halay “men should apologise” wala status ta defend korte jaya post korse - “woman should be grateful for men who protect them”. . . .FROM *MEN* !!! Bhai tui kaar team e bhai! Tui ken korli eda !

title: Brownfish Studio is a reflection of my inner child. Which is why the same ancien...
description: Brownfish Studio is a reflection of my inner child. Which is why the same ancient mirror that has reflected all of my moments, is still here with me today. No matter how big my dreams get, no matter how much i achieve, the mirror stays with me. When aesthetic pinteresty room was just a big impossible dream, this mirror was my only hope to decorate my simple traditional cream white wall. With increased brightness’s it would look like a black mirror on a white wall. And I felt like a true big creator back then. Oh what an artistic soul I have i thought. Today i look at this mirror almost everyday when i enter the studio. I see a smirk on my reflection

title: Comment section e ekta beautiful reflection of reality kintu. Same person with t...
description: Comment section e ekta beautiful reflection of reality kintu. Same person with the same calibre. Ekta location e she achieved something honourable with no extra talk. . No restrictions on your hobby or leisure activities or personal life. Just provided you with the exact award that you are worthy of. Arekta location e everyone is talking big. All the morals and values and pride. Yet no result, no identity or honour. Nijei nijeke shabashi diche, nijei nijeke bhalo boltese, nijei nijer pith chabrachche. Nijei nijeder moner maadhuri mishaaye self satisfactory honour diye boltese etai bhalo. And hating on someone because of egoistic moral high grounds abar kaande deshe chaakri nai. Keo naki thik moto value dae na. Maane in simple words. nijeke change koiro na. Location change koro Nijer jayga toiri korte hoile onek shomoy aage jayga tai change korte hoy.
